summary: Made one surgical entry-continuity edit to carry Spike's Chapter 8 dawn return image more directly into Chapter 9; the exit already handed off cleanly to the Chapter 10 hat setup, so no broader seam rewrite was needed.
edits: Adjusted the opening dust/couch image to echo Spike returning before dawn with one hand inside his jacket, strengthening the Chapter 8 to Chapter 9 handoff.
Left the closing hat/storage beat intact because it already connects directly to the next chapter's opening situation.
